story.iWant: comprehensive keyboard shortcuts for common actions
story.soThat: I can navigate and control Holokai Desktop efficiently without relying on mouse interactions.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: **AC-3.1**: Global shortcuts work when app is backgrounded: Cmd+N (New Thread), Cmd+K (Command Palette)
**AC-3.2**: In-app shortcuts work when app is focused: Cmd+1-9 (Switch Threads), Cmd+B/I (Bold/Italic), Cmd+Enter (Send Message), Esc (Close Dialog)
**AC-3.3**: Command palette (Cmd+K) opens with fuzzy search across all commands
**AC-3.4**: Command palette displays keyboard shortcuts next to command labels
**AC-3.5**: Shortcuts configuration UI allows customization of all non-system shortcuts
**AC-3.6**: Shortcut registration fails gracefully if OS conflict detected

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes

ideas.idea: Test: **AC-3.1**: Global shortcuts work when app is backgrounded: Cmd+N (New Thread), ...
Test: **AC-3.2**: In-app shortcuts work when app is focused: Cmd+1-9 (Switch Threads),...
Test: **AC-3.3**: Command palette (Cmd+K) opens with fuzzy search across all commands...
Test: **AC-3.4**: Command palette displays keyboard shortcuts next to command labels...
Test: **AC-3.5**: Shortcuts configuration UI allows customization of all non-system sh...
